subcodes.first_line: O thou who art kindled with the light of guidance! Thy letter hath been received. Praise be unto God, the utmost desire of that true friend hath been fulfilled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقتبس نور هدی نامه مرقوم رسید الحمد لله نهایت آرزوی آن دوست حقیقی حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @spiritual transformation, @exhortations and counsels, @thankfulness; gratitude, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
